tools.name: languageModelDirectAccess.getFamilyDetails
tools.description: Fetches and outputs metadata for a family from the Tisane language models.

tools.name: languageModelDirectAccess.listFeatureValues
tools.description:
Lists feature values for a particular category of features. This allows obtaining all the values such as entity types, subtypes, abuse types and tags, and more.

Returns the values as a JSON array of strings.

tools.name: languageModelDirectAccess.listHypernyms
tools.description: Lists all hypernyms related to a family. A hypernym is a parent concent. E.g. "vehicle" is a hypernym of "truck".

tools.name: languageModelDirectAccess.listHyponyms
tools.description: Lists all hyponyms related to a family. A hyponym is a child concent. E.g. "truck" is a hypernym of "vehicle".

tools.name: languageModelDirectAccess.listWordSenses
tools.description: Fetches and outputs all senses related to a word.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
